summary: P17 Amend/Withdraw/Modification Frontend Implementation Testing Complete. All 16 features tested and verified. Backend proxy health check passes. Login works for both central and franchise users. All P17 components working correctly: Amend Request button, Withdraw button, Request Modification button, ItemEditorDialog, parent transfer link, withdrawn status in timeline and history, modification type badges.

issues: From/To columns show 'Unknown' when POS API doesn't return restaurant names - this is expected behavior based on API contract

critical_code_review_comments: api.js amendRequest correctly calls POST /proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/request/{id}/amend with items payload
api.js withdrawRequest correctly calls POST /proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/request/{id}/withdraw with empty payload
api.js requestModification correctly calls POST /proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/request/{id}/modification with items payload
api.js enrichTransferMeta correctly adds parentTransferId, isModificationRequest, isWithdrawn fields
transferActions.js correctly shows amend/withdraw only for status=requested AND type=request AND user is destination
transferActions.js correctly shows modification for post-approval statuses (approved, partially_approved, dispatched, partially_received) AND type=request AND user is destination
transferActions.js correctly includes 'withdrawn' in terminal statuses list (no actions)
terminology.js STATUS_CONFIG.withdrawn has correct grey styling (bg-slate-100 text-slate-700)
StatusTimeline.jsx correctly renders withdrawn branch step with Ban icon and slate ring color
ItemEditorDialog.jsx correctly loads catalog from request-catalog endpoint and seeds from existing lines
TransferDetail.jsx correctly renders parent transfer link for modification_request transfers
TransferDetail.jsx handleAmend opens ItemEditorDialog with correct title and submit label
TransferDetail.jsx handleWithdraw opens destructive confirm dialog with correct warning message
TransferDetail.jsx handleModification opens ItemEditorDialog and navigates to child transfer on success
PendingQueues.jsx correctly renders 'Modification' badge for modification_request type
HistoryLedger.jsx correctly uses TYPE_LABELS with amber styling for modification_request

test_credentials.central_user: owner@democentral2.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=782, type=central, Master Store in UI)
test_credentials.franchise_user: owner@demofranchise4.com / Qplazm@10 (rid=786, type=franchise, Outlet in UI)

seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: P17 Amend/Withdraw/Modification frontend fully tested. Key transfers for testing: #111 (status=requested, shows Amend/Withdraw buttons for franchise), #117 (status=approved, shows Request Modification button for franchise), #118 (modification_request type, shows parent link to #117), #116 (status=withdrawn, shows grey badge and withdrawn timeline step). All P17 components verified: ItemEditorDialog (shared for amend+modification), ConfirmActionDialog (for withdraw), parent transfer link, StatusTimeline withdrawn branch, TYPE_LABELS in PendingQueues and HistoryLedger.

features_tested.1_backend_proxy_health: PASS - GET /api/ returns 'Central Inventory API Proxy' message
features_tested.2_frontend_compiles: PASS - No white screen, React root has content
features_tested.3_login_central_user: PASS - owner@democentral2.com login successful, rid=782, type=central
features_tested.4_login_franchise_user: PASS - owner@demofranchise4.com login successful, rid=786, type=franchise
features_tested.5_amend_button_visibility: PASS - Amend Request button visible on Transfer #111 (status=requested, type=request, franchise user)
features_tested.6_withdraw_button_visibility: PASS - Withdraw button visible on Transfer #111 (status=requested, type=request, franchise user)
features_tested.7_modification_button_visibility: PASS - Request Modification button visible on Transfer #117 (status=approved, type=request, franchise user)
features_tested.8_amend_dialog_opens: PASS - ItemEditorDialog opens with title 'Amend Request #111', loads catalog, seeds from existing lines
features_tested.9_withdraw_dialog_opens: PASS - ConfirmActionDialog opens with destructive warning 'This will permanently withdraw this request'
features_tested.10_modification_dialog_opens: PASS - ItemEditorDialog opens with title 'Request Modification — Transfer #117', correct description
features_tested.11_parent_transfer_link: PASS - Transfer #118 shows 'Modification of Transfer #117' link
features_tested.12_withdrawn_status_in_history: PASS - History shows 'Withdrawn' status badges for #116, #96
features_tested.13_modification_type_in_history: PASS - History shows 'Modification' type badges for #119, #118, #102
features_tested.14_action_visibility_central_user: PASS - Central user on Transfer #111 sees Approve/Reject, NOT Amend/Withdraw/Modification
features_tested.15_refresh_buttons_work: PASS - Refresh buttons present on TransferDetail and History
features_tested.16_terminology_config: PASS - STATUS_CONFIG.withdrawn and TYPE_LABELS.modification_request exist with correct values

transfer_111_requested_central.actions: Approve All, Partial Approve, Reject (NO Amend/Withdraw/Modification)

amend_dialog.title: Amend Request #111
amend_dialog.description: Replace all items in this request. Existing lines will be removed.

withdraw_dialog.title: Withdraw Request #111?
withdraw_dialog.description: This will permanently withdraw this request. This action cannot be undone — the request will be removed from the approval queue.

modification_dialog.title: Request Modification — Transfer #117
modification_dialog.description: Request additional or changed quantities. A new modification request will be created for central approval.

history_ledger.status_filter: Withdrawn pill in status filter bar
